docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-06-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES PRIOR TO THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,245.00 FILED BY LOUIE, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT KINOSHITA, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE: $45.00 SERVED DEC-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KINOSHITA, ROBERT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF WAS ABSENT. THE DEFENDANT(S) ABSENT. PURSUANT TO 02-06-15 HEARING DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
